'''zaluzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hiddenness|hiddenness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-l-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hiddenness|hiddenness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zaluzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zælizith|zælizith]] || [[word:zælizij|zælizij]] || [[word:zælizish|zælizish]] || [[word:zælizi|zælizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zaluluzuth|zaluluzuth]] || [[word:zaluluzuj|zaluluzuj]] || [[word:zaluluzush|zaluluzush]] || [[word:zaluluzu|zaluluzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zaluzuth|zaluzuth]] || [[word:zaluzuj|zaluzuj]] || [[word:zaluzush|zaluzush]] || [[word:zaluzu|zaluzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zalufzufth|zalufzufth]] || [[word:zalufzufj|zalufzufj]] || [[word:zalufzufsh|zalufzufsh]] || [[word:zalufzuf|zalufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zaluzuthu|zaluzuthu]] || [[word:zaluzuju|zaluzuju]] || [[word:zaluzushu|zaluzushu]] || [[word:zaluzuku|zaluzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zaluzuth|zaluzuth]] || [[word:zaluzuj|zaluzuj]] || [[word:zaluzush|zaluzush]] || [[word:zaluzu|zaluzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zaluzuthul|zaluzuthul]] || [[word:zaluzujul|zaluzujul]] || [[word:zaluzushul|zaluzushul]] || [[word:zaluzukul|zaluzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zaluzuuthuthu|zaluzuuthuthu]] || [[word:zaluzuujuju|zaluzuujuju]] || [[word:zaluzuushushu|zaluzuushushu]] || [[word:zaluzuuku|zaluzuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zaluzuthun|zaluzuthun]] || [[word:zaluzujun|zaluzujun]] || [[word:zaluzushun|zaluzushun]] || [[word:zaluzukun|zaluzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zaluzuthuoro|zaluzuthuoro]] || [[word:zaluzujuoro|zaluzujuoro]] || [[word:zaluzushuoro|zaluzushuoro]] || [[word:zaluzukuoro|zaluzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]

{{wordpage|c579b50}}
